Software Engineer

$100 - $200/hourpay

Required Skills

Eclipse Java
NodeJS
Backend

About micro1

micro1 is the leading AI data lab for training frontier models and evaluating AI agents. Experts contribute their diverse subject matter knowledge across domains such as finance, healthcare, STEM engineering, and more. micro1 transforms that real-world expertise into high-quality training data, evaluations, and feedback loops that improve how AI systems learn, reason, and perform.

Our platform identifies and vets top talent through an AI recruiter, enabling high-quality expert contributions at scale. We aim to enable 1 billion people to do meaningful work by applying their expertise to AI. As our global expert network grows, micro1 is building the human intelligence layer for frontier AI.

Software Engineer

Role Type: Contractor

Location: Remote


micro1 is engaging experienced Software Engineers to contribute to a customer project focused on backend software development and AI model evaluation. In this role, you'll use your engineering expertise to help train next-generation AI systems by solving real-world programming tasks, reviewing code, and providing high-quality technical feedback.


This opportunity is ideal for professionals with strong backend development skills in technologies such as Java, Node.js, Go, or Rust. A Cybersecurity or SecOps background is highly preferred, particularly for candidates with hands-on experience in secure software development, application security, penetration testing, or security-focused code reviews. No prior AI experience is required—your software engineering expertise is what matters.


As an expert you will be creating Reinforcement Learning Environments which test and AI model’s ability to solve complex software engineering problems related to fixing code, creating features, refactoring code and optimizing performance. You will be tasked with creating a reproducible environment and golden reference solution for the problem.


A Cybersecurity/SecOps background or exposure is highly preferred


Scope of Work

  1. Build and maintain reinforcement learning environments that exercise real backend programming tasks.
  2. Write backend services and the supporting code that powers those environments, using Java, Python, Node.js, Go, Rust, or similar.
  3. Write thorough unit and integration tests. Test coverage is central to this role, not an afterthought.
  4. Review code for correctness, performance, maintainability, and security, and give clear feedback to other engineers.
  5. Solve programming tasks and document your technical reasoning so it can be used to improve AI model quality.
  6. Work asynchronously with a distributed team and write down engineering decisions clearly.


Preferred Qualifications

  1. Strong experience in backend software development using Java, Node.js, Go, Rust, or similar technologies.
  2. Proven experience building scalable backend systems and APIs.
  3. Experience with debugging, performance optimization, and automated testing.
  4. Strong understanding of software engineering best practices and code review.
  5. Cybersecurity/SecOps experience or exposure is highly preferred, including areas such as application security, secure coding, penetration testing, vulnerability assessment, OWASP, CWE, or security-focused code reviews.
  6. Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
  7. Experience working effectively in remote, distributed teams.
  8. Familiarity with AI, data-driven, or large-scale technical projects is a plus.


Compensation Structure

Compensation is output-based; experts are paid per task that meets the project specifications. The time required to complete work may vary depending on the expert’s experience and workflow. Minimum submission requirements apply. Experts must submit a minimum of tasks per week.


Start Timeline & Availability

We typically fill roles within 48 hours and are looking for experts ready to jump in right away. If selected, we expect you to start your first tasks within 24–48 hours of completing onboarding.

Interested?

Please note that after completing the interview process, you will be considered for this and other roles that match your skills.

Have any questions? See FAQs

Refer and Earn$1000
